data.name: Brain Exam with Benefits
data.detailed_description:
The First Completely AI Generated Game Is Here!


Brain Exam with Benefits 2


關於此遊戲

Brain Exam with Benefits is a lighthearted Match 3 game with Annie, a professional brain examiner who has a sexy side. Impress her with your smartness to charm her into submission, or fail pathetically.



Features:

- Hyper-polished Match 3 gameplay with attention to detail.
- Lots of ways to explore Annie's sexy side.
- High quality sexy CG after each game!
- Failure to progress is also progress.
- No empty grind, when you're playing you'll be having fun.

data.short_description: Brain Exam with Benefits is a lighthearted Match 3 game with Annie, a professional brain examiner who has a sexy side. Impress her with your smartness to charm her into submission, or pathetically fail.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
